name: Espnow → On Receive
description: An automation to perform when a directed (non-broadcast) packet is received from a registered peer. May be specified multiple times. See [`on_receive`](https://esphome.io/components/espnow#espnow-on_receive).

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: Only fire this trigger when the packet's source address matches. If not set, the trigger fires for any source address.
